markets.question: Friend vs. Kozlov: Set 1 Games O/U 8.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jay Dylan Friend and Stefan Kozlov in the Phoenix, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 9. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Challenger results.
markets.groupItemTitle: Phoenix: Jay Dylan Friend vs Stefan Kozlov Set 1 O/U 8.5

events.title: Phoenix: Jay Dylan Friend vs Stefan Kozlov
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Jay Dylan Friend and Stefan Kozlov in the Phoenix, scheduled for March 11 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Jay Dylan Friend' if Jay Dylan Friend advances against Stefan Kozlov.

This market will resolve to 'Stefan Kozlov' if Stefan Kozlov advances against Jay Dylan Friend.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Jay Dylan Friend vs. Stefan Kozlov: Total Sets O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Jay Dylan Friend and Stefan Kozlov in the Phoenix, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Challenger statistics.

markets.question: Set 1 Winner: Travaglia vs Halys
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Stefano Travaglia and Quentin Halys in the Phoenix, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to “Travaglia” if Stefano Travaglia wins the first set. It will resolve to “Halys” if Quentin Halys wins the first set.

markets.question: BNB Up or Down - March 13, 1AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BNB/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BNB/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BNB_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BNB/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

events.title: BNB Up or Down - March 13, 1AM ET
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BNB/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BNB/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BNB_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BNB/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Spread: Bethune-Cookman Wildcats (-5.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for March 11 at 2:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Bethune-Cookman Wildcats" if the Bethune-Cookman Wildcats win the game by 6 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Prairie View A&M Panthers". 

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Prairie View A&M Panthers vs. Bethune-Cookman Wildcats
events.description:
This event is for the CBB game between Prairie View A&M Panthers and Bethune-Cookman Wildcats on March 11 at 2:00 PM ET.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for March 11 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Mississippi State Bulldogs and Auburn Tigers combine to score 160 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 160, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

markets.question: Bitcoin Up or Down - March 12, 12:55AM-1:00AM ET
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.

events.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the Bitcoin price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the BTC/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/btc-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream BTC/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
